2.error: The Esses is actually a two-element sequence (Left-Hander then Right-Hander at the start of No Name Straight) but is recorded as a single corner; the marker 0.309 / coordinate sits between the two apexes rather than on either

gp.errors_summary: Data is largely clean; only structural note is that 'Esses' (T2) compresses the classic Left-Hander/Right-Hander pair into a single corner entry, with its coordinate placed between the two apexes
